headline: William Saliba
body: #AFC #FRA French outlet L'Equipe reports that William Saliba could undergo surgery after the World Cup to address a persistent back complaint. https://t.co/546EwMCGs6
text:
#AFC #FRA 

French outlet L'Equipe reports that William Saliba could undergo surgery after the World Cup to address a persistent back complaint.
